   159	        if response.status == 200 or response.status == 201:
   160	            return "SUCCESS", response.data
   161	        else:
   162	            return "OTHER_ERROR", f"HTTP {response.status}: {response.data}"
   163	    except oci.exceptions.ServiceError as e:
   164	        if "Out of host capacity" in str(e.message):
   165	            return "OUT_OF_CAPACITY", e.message
   166	        elif "Too Many Requests" in str(e.message) or e.status == 429:
   167	            return "RATE_LIMIT", f"429 频率限制: {e.message}"
   168	        else:
   169	            return "OTHER_ERROR", f"ServiceError {e.status}: {e.message}"
   170	    except Exception as e:
   171	        return "EXCEPTION", str(e)
   172	
   173	
   174	def error_backoff():
   175	    """错误退避：指数增长，有上限"""
   176	    global consecutive_errors
   177	    wait = min(ERROR_BACKOFF_BASE * (2 ** consecutive_errors), ERROR_BACKOFF_MAX)
   178	    consecutive_errors += 1
   179	    # 加点随机抖动
   180	    wait = int(wait * random.uniform(0.8, 1.2))
   181	    logging.warning(f"⚠️ 错误退避，等待 {wait} 秒...")
   182	    return wait
   183	
   184	
   185	# ================= 主循环 =================
   186	logging.info("🚀 OCI 抢购脚本 v2 已启动（SDK + 多AD轮询 + 分时段策略）")
   187	logging.info(f"📋 目标: {SHAPE} {OCPUS} OCPU / {MEMORY_GB} GB RAM")
   188	logging.info(f"📋 可用域: {', '.join(ADS)}")
   189	logging.info(f"📋 休息时间: UTC {REST_START_HOUR}:00-{REST_END_HOUR}:00")
   190	
   191	while True:
   192	    # 1. 休息时间检查
   193	    if is_rest_time():
   194	        logging.info(f"😴 休息时间 (UTC {REST_START_HOUR}:00-{REST_END_HOUR}:00)，30 分钟后再检查")
   195	        time.sleep(REST_WAIT[0])
   196	        continue
   197	
   198	    # 2. 获取下一个 AD
   199	    ad = get_next_ad()
   200	    ad_num = ad.split("-AD-")[1]
   201	
   202	    # 3. 发起请求
   203	    status, detail = launch_instance(ad)
   204	
   205	    if status == "SUCCESS":
   206	        instance_id = detail.id if hasattr(detail, 'id') else 'unknown'
   207	        logging.info(f"🎉【成功】抢到了！AD={ad_num}, Instance={instance_id}")
   208	        logging.info(f"🎉 脚本停止。共尝试 {continuous_out_of_capacity_count} 次无货后命中。")
   209	        break
   210	
   211	    if status == "RATE_LIMIT":
   212	        consecutive_errors += 1
   213	        wait = min(ERROR_BACKOFF_BASE * (2 ** consecutive_errors), 3600)  # 指数退避，最长1小时
   214	        logging.warning(f"⚠️【频率限制】{detail} | 连续错误 {consecutive_errors} 次，退避 {wait} 秒...")
   215	        time.sleep(wait)
   216	        continue
   217	
   218	    if status == "OUT_OF_CAPACITY":
   219	        consecutive_errors = 0  # 重置错误计数
   220	        continuous_out_of_capacity_count += 1
   221	        logging.info(
   222	            f"❌【无货】AD-{ad_num} | 连续第 {continuous_out_of_capacity_count} 次"
   223	        )
   224	
   225	    elif status in ("OTHER_ERROR", "EXCEPTION"):
   226	        logging.error(f"⚠️【错误】AD-{ad_num} | {str(detail).strip()[:200]}")
   227	        # 错误退避
   228	        wait = error_backoff()
   229	        time.sleep(wait)
   230	        continue
   231	
   232	    # 4. 熔断检查
   233	    if continuous_out_of_capacity_count >= MAX_RETRY_THRESHOLD:
   234	        logging.error(
   235	            f"🔥【熔断停止】连续 {MAX_RETRY_THRESHOLD} 次无货，自动停止"
   236	        )
   237	        break
   238	
   239	    # 5. 按时段等待
   240	    wait = get_wait_time()
   241	    time.sleep(wait)
